seo_title: Current Time in Addis Ababa — EAT (UTC+3)
seo_description: Current time in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia — live East Africa Time (EAT, UTC+3) clock, no DST, and time differences with Nairobi, Dubai, and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in Addis Ababa right now?
faq.answer: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia uses East Africa Time (EAT, UTC+3) year-round. Ethiopia does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Addis Ababa shares its timezone with Nairobi (Kenya), Dar es Salaam (Tanzania), Kampala (Uganda), and Mogadishu (Somalia). The IANA timezone identifier is Africa/Addis_Ababa.

faq.question: What time zone is Addis Ababa in?
faq.answer: Addis Ababa is in the East Africa Time zone (EAT, UTC+3) year-round. Ethiopia uses UTC+3 with no DST. Note: Ethiopia also uses its own traditional Ethiopian clock system where the day starts at 6:00 AM (Ethiopian time = international time minus 6 hours for daytime). The IANA identifier is Africa/Addis_Ababa.

faq.question: Does Addis Ababa observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Ethiopia does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Addis Ababa remains on EAT (UTC+3) year-round. Ethiopia also has a unique traditional calendar (Ethiopian calendar) that differs from the Gregorian calendar — it has 13 months and is approximately 7 years behind the Gregorian calendar.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Addis Ababa and Nairobi?
faq.answer: Addis Ababa (EAT, UTC+3) and Nairobi (EAT, UTC+3) are on the same timezone. There is no time difference between Addis Ababa and Nairobi year-round, as both use East Africa Time with no DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Addis Ababa and Dubai?
faq.answer: Addis Ababa (EAT, UTC+3) and Dubai (GST, UTC+4) differ by 1 hour — Dubai is 1 hour ahead. Neither Ethiopia nor UAE observes DST, so this 1-hour gap is constant year-round.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Addis Ababa and London?
faq.answer: Addis Ababa (EAT, UTC+3) is 3 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), Addis Ababa is 2 hours ahead. Since Ethiopia has no DST, the gap changes only when London transitions its clocks.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Addis Ababa?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Addis Ababa are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EAT (or 2:00 AM to 11:00 AM in the Ethiopian traditional clock), Monday through Friday. Addis Ababa is Ethiopia's capital and Africa's fourth-largest city. It is the diplomatic capital of Africa and home to the African Union (AU) headquarters. Major industries include coffee (Ethiopia is the birthplace of coffee), flowers, textiles, and a growing tech sector. Ethiopian Airlines, one of Africa's largest airlines, is headquartered in Addis Ababa.
